title: Paragraph ID

table-204-204.caption: Show all paragraph ids and texts for the document with name 'Welcome to NY'.
data: Welcome to the incredible city of New York! We're thrilled to have you here.
This guide will help you navigate the city's iconic landmarks and hidden gems.
From Times Square to Central Park, prepare for an unforgettable experience.
Don't forget to explore the diverse culinary scene, offering tastes from around the world.
Public transportation, especially the subway, is your best friend for getting around efficiently.
We encourage you to immerse yourself in the local culture and vibrant neighborhoods.
Enjoy your stay and make lasting memories in the Big Apple!
